name: Foley 59" Floor Lamp - FLL7001 - Gold/White Marble - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Foley 59 inch floor lamp, where elegance meets functionality. This exquisite lamp features a striking combination of gold and white marble, creating a stunning focal point for any room. Crafted from durable metal, this lamp showcases a sleek design that complements a variety of decor styles. The smooth marble base provides stability while adding a touch of sophistication to your living area.

The gold finish offers a warm glow, enhancing the ambiance of your home. Standing at 59 inches, this floor lamp is perfect for reading nooks, living rooms, or bedrooms, providing ample light where you need it most. Its graceful silhouette and clean lines make it a versatile addition to your home. Transform your environment with the Foley floor lamp and enjoy the blend of style and practicality it brings to your decor.
